_comment: User 2026-05-21: rewrote the give-map beat so the player can see a visible thrown-map projectile fly across the screen from Higgins (right side, behind desk) to PP (entry-left). Higgins office bounds are (990, 290, 220, 200) → his hand is near (1100, 380). User 2026-06-10: the old end point (320, 520) was past PP's front edge - the map flew THROUGH his head and landed behind his face. PP spawn (220, 480), body spans ~220-465 facing RIGHT, so the catch point now sits IN FRONT of him at (440, 540) - between PP and Higgins, at his outstretched paws. The travel_map_icon.png is reused as the projectile sprite. If a dedicated throw_map / catch_map sheet lands later, swap the one-shot anim names. Falls back gracefully if the projectile sprite is missing - only the Higgins one-shot + PP receive_map + dialog still play.

dialog.speaker: Director Higgins
dialog.text: Catch! Use that map. Find what's gone wrong out there.
